spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Handshake_Master_Spec_v02.144.md 7.6.3 (Phase 1) -> [ADD v02.144] Second-pass feature-family coverage / coverage sweep

draft_scope.intent:
- What: Backfill Project Brain as a governed runtime retrieval/notebook surface with explicit query, citation, and context-compaction visibility.
- Why: Project Brain is strategically central and will guide many future model/tool decisions, so appendix/runtime coverage cannot remain implicit.
draft_scope.scope_sketch:
- IN_SCOPE:
  - Project Brain query/runtime mapping.
  - ContextPack / QueryPlan / RetrievalTrace posture.
- OUT_OF_SCOPE:
  - Full Project Brain implementation.
  - Advanced ranking experimentation beyond runtime mapping.
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria:
- Project Brain has explicit runtime/job/tool visibility in Appendix coverage.
- Project Brain is linked to Context Packs and Semantic Catalog deterministically.
draft_scope.risks_unknowns: - Risk: Project Brain becomes a vague RAG promise instead of a deterministic runtime surface.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Stub Markdown may contain stale draft scope until activated through a signed packet.
Apps must not treat stub contracts as runnable work packets.
minimum_controls: Require official packet contract before Coder or Validator launch.
Fail drift checks when stub Markdown changes without contract regeneration.
